title: Help needed...... Boards - Forms - Groups
excerpt:
Hello fellow Monday users  - 
I was just wondering if anyone knows how to create two forms on one board, and have the responses go to different groups? So Form 1 responses to group 1, form 2 responses to group 2?

posts.author: Kevin_EWI (Kevin Emery )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello fellow Monday users -

I was just wondering if anyone knows how to create two forms on one board, and have the responses go to different groups? So Form 1 responses to group 1, form 2 responses to group 2?

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Create the two forms as you would do.
In the setting of the form builder go to Customize TAB.
In the tab go to monday.com settings
And then go to Group for answers option.
IN Form 1, select the groop you want to use.
Same in form 2
